title: Lepidoneuron longifolium
taxonomy: Lepidoneuron longifolium is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It belongs to the class Polypodiopsida, which is a group of vascular plants that have true leaves. Lepidoneuron longifolium is further classified as a member of the order Polypodiales, a large and diverse group of ferns. The genus Lepidoneuron is also part of this classification, and is closely related to the genus Blechnum. The classification of Lepidoneuron longifolium reflects its evolutionary relationships and its place within the plant kingdom.
